ops.title: Toast-based notifications and design-system motion/elevation foundation
ops.body: ToastStack owns all notification UI: fixed top-right, newest-first, last 4 visible, auto-dismiss per kind (info 5s / warn 8s / error 10s), hover pauses every timer and leave restarts them at full duration; timers dismiss through a ref so a changed onDismiss identity never fires stale. Errors are role=alert, the rest role=status. There is no in-flow notification band anymore (AppShell lost its notifications slot; NotificationsBar deleted, zero consumers existed). base.css is the direction-agnostic system layer: type scale (--text-2xs..xl, 1.2 modular on 15px), elevation ladder --shadow-1/2/3 + --shadow-up (graphite-tinted rgb(9 10 12 /) pairs; dark-mode depth comes from --surface-raised, not heavier shadows), motion tokens --dur-1/2/3 + --ease-out/--ease-in-out, --content-width, unified :focus-visible, and one global prefers-reduced-motion guard (per-rule guards are redundant — do not re-add). Consumer skins (e.g. cc-present domain.css) own palette/identity; keep direction-specific values out of base.css.
ops.when: When modifying toast/notification behavior, refining motion/shadow/elevation tokens, or extending AppShell notification surfaces
